criteria_scores.rationale: Under adverse conditions with GERD declining to 1.95% GDP, dedicated agency and mandatory procurement provide the strongest counter-cyclical investment signal.
With R&D personnel contracting to 1.28% and high-tech employment at 4.2%, mandatory training and certification programmes are the most effective protection mechanism.
Comprehensive framework includes sustainability criteria for quantum hardware.
criteria_scores.assumption: No direct indicator available; score based on domain knowledge.

criteria_scores.rationale: With only 280 active quantum projects and 950M EUR committed, single governance is critical to prevent fragmentation under budget pressure.
High implementation complexity remains; fiscal pressure may delay agency setup beyond 2-4 year estimate.
